notes: All 7 priority critical paths (hooks and components) are covered. Frontend has 71 tests, backend has 35 tests. Priority components all tested: useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession, AudioPlayer, JapanesePhrase, VoiceRecorder, HighlightedText. No refactor candidates >300 lines without tests. Secondary components lacking tests: GrammarMode/ExerciseContainer (244 lines), LessonMode/LessonDetail (174 lines), SpeakingMode/ConversationMode (147 lines), ReadingMode/ResultsView (145 lines). Backend missing tests: db/init.ts, routes/index.ts, server.ts, elevenlabs/index.ts, elevenlabs/types.ts, elevenlabs/voices.ts, furigana/index.ts, types/index.ts.
